title: BetterUX
description: A mod that adds various little UX improvements to enhance the overall user experience.
body: Better UX is a Minecraft mod that adds various little UX improvements to enhance the overall user experience. All features can be configured and selectively turned on or off in the mod's settings. UI enhancements * Close open dialogs by just right-clicking anywhere * Close open dialogs by just clicking anywhere outside of it * Reverse the mouse-wheel scrolling direction of the inventory hotbar * Automatically focus search field when opening a dialog with a recipe book UX enhancements * _Sort_ button for sorting player inventory and containers * _Take All_ button for transferring all items from a container to inventory * _Store All_ button for transferring all items from inventory to a container Note that when playing online, transferring and sorting of inventory **will only work** when the mod is also installed on the server. The UI enhancements will work regardless of whether the mod is installed on the server or not. ![Inventory Sorting](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rarepeepo/better-ux/main/images/inventory_sorting.png) ![Settings](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rarepeepo/better-ux/main/images/settings.png)
